---
title: "References — Dimensionality reduction"
---

Foundational and current literature on dimensionality reduction methods relevant to CTIR's [`songR`](https://github.com/CTTIR/songR) and adjacent packages: SONG, UMAP, t-SNE, PHATE, PCA.

## Suggested reading

- SONG — Tang et al. The primary method paper for the technique implemented in [`songR`](https://github.com/CTTIR/songR).
- UMAP — McInnes, Healy, Melville.
- t-SNE — van der Maaten and Hinton.
- PHATE — Moon et al.
- Foundational PCA references in the multivariate-analysis context.

See the [disclaimer](index.qmd#disclaimer) — this is a starting list, not a curated bibliography.
